title: TortMod
description: This mod adds cakes that are generated in mines!
body:
## TortMod - A mod where cakes are more than just food.

**Tortmod 1.21.1 is here!**

This mod adds many new cakes to Minecraft. You can get them in two ways: by mining new cake ores that generate in the world, or by crafting them from vanilla items.

Each cake does something different when you eat it. Some give strong buffs, others have unique mechanics or trade-offs.

### A few examples:

*   **Ender Pearl Cake:** Gives you the "Void Anchor" effect. If you fall into the void, it teleports you back to safety. It's basically a life insurance.
*   **Redstone Cake:** Repairs the item in your off-hand by 5% durability. Useful if you don't have Mending.
*   **Chocolate Cake:** Gives Speed II and Haste II. Much stronger than vanilla potions.
*   **Lapis Cake:** Consumes your XP to give you powerful combat buffs.
*   **Winerr Cake:** Has a small chance to "glitch" the game - shuffle your hotbar, damage items, or give random effects. Eat at your own risk.
*   **TNT Cake:** When you eat it, a lit TNT block appears where you were standing.

### Features:

*   40 different edible cakes (and raw versions).
*   New ores that generate in the Overworld, Nether, and The End.
*   A crafting system for non-ore cakes. You make flour, then a dough cake, and use it as a base.
*   **Villager Trading:**
    *   **Farmers** sell delicious and buffing cakes.
    *   **Clerics** sell magical and dangerous cakes (like Ender Pearl or Magnet Cake).
    *   **Masons** buy your Raw Cakes for emeralds.
*   New status effects like Magnetism (pulls items), Gold Rush (makes piglins neutral), and Hiding in Sands (invisibility on sand).

***

**Found a bug or have an idea?** Report it in the [Issues](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tortmod/issues) section.

**Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tortmod)!**
